product_overview: A mobile-first single-page application that guides Eltex customers through uploading property and identity documents, signing region-specific legal authorizations, completing an optional energy-certificate survey, and submitting a complete project for assessor review.
core_goals: Allow customers to locate their project by phone number and continue a saved multi-step submission flow using a project code in the URL.
Collect identity and property documentation (DNI/NIE, IBI, electricity bill) with AI extraction so customers can confirm extracted data quickly.
Capture region-specific legal authorization signatures and overlay them onto PDF templates according to province rules.
Collect an optional 4-step energy certificate survey and customer signature to generate the certificate or allow assessors to complete it later.
Provide customers a final review checklist and a single action to submit a complete project to Eltex.
Provide assessors a password-protected dashboard to review submitted projects, view extracted data, and download project archives.

features.name: Phone Number Entry
features.description: Customer provides their Spanish mobile number to locate an existing project; successful lookup redirects to the project-specific app state using a project code in the URL.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type phone number into input field -> Submit phone lookup -> Be redirected to /?code=ELT20250001 and see the project start at the appropriate step
Navigate to / -> Type phone number into input field -> Submit phone lookup -> See an error message indicating the number was not found

features.name: Property Document Upload
features.description: Customer uploads identity (DNI/NIE), IBI certificate, and electricity bill (photos or PDFs). The app runs AI extraction and shows the extracted fields for customer confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Upload DNI/NIE front photo -> Review AI-extracted name, document number and expiry date -> Upload IBI certificate photo or PDF -> Upload electricity bill pages -> Confirm extracted data and proceed to province selection

Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Upload DNI front photo only -> See a requirement to upload DNI back when front-only detected -> Upload DNI back photo -> Confirm extracted data and proceed to province selection

features.name: Province Selection
features.description: Customer selects their province/region which determines whether and how many region-specific legal PDFs must be signed.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Select Cataluña as province -> Proceed to representation step requiring three signatures
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Select Madrid or Valencia as province -> Proceed to representation step requiring two signatures
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Select a province with no signing requirement -> Skip representation and proceed to the energy-certificate survey or review step

features.name: Legal Document Signing (Representation)
features.description: Customer draws signatures on a canvas and applies them to the appropriate region-specific legal PDF templates; the number of signatures depends on the selected province.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Draw signature on signature pad -> Apply signature to the first legal document -> Review signed PDF preview -> Repeat draw-and-apply for each required document until all signatures are applied -> Proceed to the next step
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Draw signature on signature pad -> Apply signature to two required documents (Madrid/Valencia) -> Review signed previews and proceed to the next step

features.name: Energy Certificate Survey
features.description: A 4-step survey collects technical housing data required to generate an energy certificate; the customer may complete and sign the certificate or skip it for assessor completion.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004 -> Enter cadastral reference, habitable area, floor count and bedroom count -> Enter doors and windows counts by orientation -> Select window frame material, glass type and shutter presence -> Select thermal installation type, boiler fuel, air conditioning and heating emitter type -> Indicate product sold and existing customer status -> Draw signature on signature pad and finalize the certificate
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004 -> Start energy certificate survey -> Choose to skip the survey -> Proceed to review and submit step

features.name: Review and Submit
features.description: Customer reviews a checklist showing completion status for all required items, returns to fix any incomplete items, and submits the entire project to Eltex.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> View checklist of all required items with completion status -> Select an incomplete item to return and fix it -> Return to review and confirm all items are complete -> Submit documentation -> See success screen after submission

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Password-protected dashboard for assessors to view submitted projects, inspect uploaded documents and extracted data, download full project ZIPs, and export the project list.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Enter admin password eltex2025 to log in -> View list of submitted projects with key metadata -> Select a project to view details -> View uploaded documents and AI-extracted data -> Download project ZIP -> Export project list as CSV -> Log out
Navigate to /dashboard -> Enter an incorrect password -> See access denied and remain on the login screen

code_summary.routing_notes: IMPORTANT: This is a pure SPA. ALL customer routes are accessed via the root path with a query param: /?code=ELTXXXXXX (e.g. /?code=ELT20250001). There are NO path-based customer routes like /property-docs or /review. The app uses internal React state to switch between sections (property-docs, province-selection, representation, energy-certificate, review, success). To test a specific section, navigate to /?code=ELTXXXXXX and the app routes automatically to the correct step based on form completion state. Test project ELT20250004 and ELT20250005 are pre-seeded for energy-certificate flow.

routes.description: Phone entry (no code). Navigate here and enter phone to find project.
Solar project — starts at property-docs step. All customer sections accessed via this root URL.
Solar project pre-seeded for energy-certificate flow testing
Admin dashboard. Password = eltex2025. Enter at /dashboard login page.

features.name: Phone Number Entry
features.description: Customer enters their Spanish mobile number. System looks up their project and redirects to the form with ?code=ELTXXXXXX.
user_interactions: Type phone number into input field
Click "Continuar" button to submit
See error message if number not found
Get redirected to /?code=ELTXXXXXX on success

features.name: Property Document Upload
features.description: Customer uploads identity document (DNI/NIE), IBI certificate, and electricity bill. AI extracts data from each document automatically.
user_interactions: Tap camera icon to upload DNI/NIE front photo
Review AI-extracted name, DNI number, expiry date
Tap to upload DNI back photo (required for card-front-only uploads)
Tap to upload IBI certificate photo or PDF
Tap to upload electricity bill (one or more pages)
Click "Siguiente" to proceed to province selection

features.name: Province Selection
features.description: Customer selects their province/region. This determines which legal signing documents are required.
user_interactions: Select province from dropdown or list
Click "Siguiente" to proceed

features.name: Legal Document Signing (Representation)
features.description: Customer signs region-specific legal PDFs using a canvas-based signature pad. Cataluña requires 3 signatures, Madrid/Valencia require 2, other provinces skip.
user_interactions: Draw signature on signature pad canvas
Tap "Firmar" to apply signature to document
Review signed PDF preview
Repeat for each required document
Click "Siguiente" to continue

features.name: Energy Certificate Survey
features.description: 4-step survey capturing technical housing data for the energy certificate. Customer signs the completed certificate.
user_interactions: Fill in cadastral reference, habitable area, floor count, bedroom count
Enter door and window counts by orientation (N/E/S/W)
Select window frame material, glass type, shutter presence
Select thermal installation type and boiler fuel
Select air conditioning type
Select heating emitter type
Select product sold (solar panels, aerothermal, or both)
Indicate if existing customer, if has solar panels
Draw signature on signature pad
Click "Finalizar" to complete or "Omitir" to skip

features.name: Review and Submit
features.description: Shows a checklist of all required items with completion status. Customer reviews all items and submits to Eltex.
user_interactions: View checklist of all submitted items
Click incomplete items to go back and fix them
Click "Enviar documentación" to submit
See success screen after submission

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Password-protected dashboard for Eltex assessors to view submitted projects, review documents, and download ZIPs.
user_interactions: Enter password "eltex2025" to log in
View list of all submitted projects
Click a project to view its details
View uploaded document images and extracted data
Click "Descargar ZIP" to download all project files
Click "Exportar CSV" to export project list
Click "Cerrar sesión" to log out

known_limitations.issue: Photos are stored as base64 in localStorage/IndexedDB — not sent to server during extraction, only metadata is synced
known_limitations.impact: Large images may hit localStorage quota on older devices

known_limitations.issue: Autocropper Python service may not be running in development
known_limitations.impact: Document photos will not be auto-straightened before AI extraction

known_limitations.issue: Province "other" is no longer a user-selectable option but exists in legacy data
known_limitations.impact: Old projects with location="other" will skip signing section correctly
